zh.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis於1482年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。她於1517年與William Baker在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1557年在英國英格蘭享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis于1482年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可。她于1517年与William Baker在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1557年在英国英格兰享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hawis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Hawk , with excrescent -s, a development very common in the Midlands.
variant of   Hawkins  , with partial ellipsis of the final syllable.

variants.name: Hawkes
meanings: English (mainly central and southeastern England): variant of   Hawks  .

variants.name: Hawk
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English havoc, havek, hauk ‘hawk or falcon’ (Old English hafoc). It may have been given to a professional falconer, to someone of a savage or cruel disposition, or to someone who held land by providing hawks for his lord, as in an instance from 1130, where Ralph Hauoc owed the royal Exchequer two ‘girfals’ (i.e. gyrfalcons or hawks).
English: topographic name for a ‘(dweller in) the nook or corner’, from Middle English halke (derived from Old English halh + the diminutive suffix -oc).

English: possibly also a survival into Middle English of the Old English personal name Hafoc, which was originally a nickname from the word ‘hawk, falcon’. It seems to have died out of use as a personal name by c. 1250.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis was born in 1482, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. She married William Baker in 1517, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1557, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis est née en 1482, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William Baker en 1517, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1557, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis wurde 1482 in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1517 in England, United Kingdom William Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1557 im Alter von 76 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis è nata il nel 1482 nel Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William Baker nel 1517, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1557, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Hawisは1482年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた。1517年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1557年にイギリスイギリスで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis(은)는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1517년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1557년 영국 잉글랜드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis nasceu em 1482, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com William Baker em 1517, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1557, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis родилась в 1482 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Baker в 1517 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1557 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margery Hawis nació en 1482, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William Baker en 1517, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1557, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
